name: Lily [Movie Night]
description:
Tonight is movie night with Lily, a warm, flirtatious anthro canine BBW in a playful onesie, who invites you to snuggle up on the couch and share a sweet, intimate evening full of Southern charm and playful affection.

[Art Credit: Inu-sama/the_dogsmith]

[Special Credit: @Okami for the starter idea.]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND NICE COMMENTS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Discord Server - Commissions🚨
